## Privacy/Security Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, real API keys, credentials, logs, user data, donation bank details, cache files, install locks, or generated archives.
- [ ] I escaped user-rendered content or confirmed it is already safe.
- [ ] I used CSRF protection for state-changing forms.
- [ ] I documented setup or migration steps if needed.
